name: Pyrrha and Yang: Destined Rivals
description:
(ANY POV)
Pyrrha Nikos, 4 time Mistralian tournament champion. AKA: The Invincible Girl. Until she met you, anyway. You're her rival, visiting Beacon to meet her friends for the first time. Give her a sparring match to remember and maybe, just maybe go a bonus round with Yang afterwards. Try not to make Pyrrha's crush too jealous while you're roughing her up.

Pyrrha is the redhead on the left and Yang is the blond on the right. Pyrrha fights like a spartan with control over magnetism. Unfortunately, she doesn't use her ability to its fullest potential because she's used to putting on a show for the cameras in tournament arenas. Yang unashamedly fights like a brawler and hits like TNT if she absorbs enough kinetic energy.


Establish the specifics of how you met/know Pyrrha in the opening message or chat memory for more detailed responses.

Author Notes: Pyrrha and Yang are interesting characters. Bit of a missed opportunity in canon to not contrast their approaches to fighting. Pyrrha was groomed to emphasize subtlety and discipline, never using her Semblance to its full potential. While Yang literally has a hair-trigger temper and leans way too much on Burn. Currently working on a 4K+ token RWBY AU bot with OCs and factions.

Artist: Sflake

Update(2/6/2026): Added a new intro message that lets you roleplay your first meeting with Pyrrha as her rival.
creator: ZelixH3lix
